title: [Red Forest, Inner Weald]
description: An empty nest lies silent in a small crook where an elongated branch juts out from a bent tree.  Far below the branch stretches a rose bramble with sharpened thorns opening upward like a toothy maw.  Impaled upon several of the thorns are the lifeless bodies of small birds.

wayto.24716: ;e result = nil;until result =~ /Obvious paths: northeast, southeast/;fput "stand" until standing?;result = dothistimeout "go fog", 5, /You attempt to navigate your way through the fog, but get turned around and come right back out where you started!|Obvious paths: northeast, southeast/;if result =~ /You attempt to navigate your way through the fog, but get turned around and come right back out where you started!/;sleep 0.5;waitrt?;end;end
